assessment.note: He names a specific growth gap: he can deliver projects but hesitates when the work shifts to cross-org alignment and influence.

new_queue.label: Cross-org alignment
new_queue.name: Cross-org alignment — what about that work makes you hesitate?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific fear or constraint behind his hesitation in influence-heavy work.

new_queue.label: Direction
new_queue.name: When you imagine yourself eighteen months from now, what's actually different?
new_queue.description: Probes whether they have a real picture of where they want to go.

new_queue.label: Next-level definition
new_queue.name: What does senior scope mean to you in practice?
new_queue.description: Forces a concrete definition of the next-level role instead of abstract ambition.

new_queue.label: Trust gap
new_queue.name: Where does stakeholder trust feel thinnest for you right now?
new_queue.description: Gets him to name the relationships or contexts where influence is weakest.

new_queue.label: Executor mode
new_queue.name: Where are you still operating more like an executor than a strategic owner?
new_queue.description: Identifies the parts of his work that remain tactical when they may need broader ownership.

new_queue.label: Leverage tradeoff
new_queue.name: What would you have to stop doing to create more leverage in your week?
new_queue.description: Forces a trade-off between delivery habits and strategic leadership time.

new_queue.label: Next move
new_queue.name: What is the first concrete move you want to make before we next meet?
new_queue.description: Closes on a specific commitment that advances the growth plan without opening a new topic.
